patches.rationale: Add source attribution to verbatim quote per ISS-882. Raw-text archive has shorter formulation; adding capture reference prevents a defender claiming misquotation if dome updates the text.

patches.find: evidence of fitting to the globe model, not independent confirmation.
patches.replace: evidence of fitting to the globe model, not independent confirmation. A defender might argue that gravity measurements are geometry-independent — but that concedes the point: if the dome's formula reproduces WGS84 regardless of underlying geometry, it carries no discriminating power between globe and dome models.
patches.rationale: Add defense pre-emption per ISS-886 / curmudgeon review SEC-6.1-post-EXP086. One sentence closes the geometry-independence escape before a defender can deploy it.
